overview: The Andrology Institute of America specializes in male infertility treatment and assisted reproductive technologies, with over 45 years of experience. They offer services including semen analysis, IUI, IVF, ICSI, gender selection, surrogacy, and egg/embryo freezing.
highlights: International partnership network with overseas affiliates
targetAudience: Heterosexual couples, same-sex couples, and single individuals seeking fertility treatment and assisted reproductive technologies.
